name: 3 Tier Entry Bench with Hooks Black Metal with Natural Wood - Brightroom™
description:
Simple yet functional, this 3-Tier Entry Bench with Hooks from Brightroom™ makes a perfect choice to help keep your entryway clutter-free. This entryway bench is designed with a place to sit while putting on shoes and boots, and comes with multiple hooks to help provide ample hanging space for your coat, hat and other accessories. The shelves offer enough space for your shoes, books and more, helping you maintain a clean home. Crafted with a mix of black metal frame and natural wood, this entry bench with hook lends mixed-material style to your space.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
